name: workflow-daily-work
description: Daily-work automation toolkit. Turn any findings source into an Azure DevOps backlog, safely and traceably.

plugins.name: ado-backlog
plugins.description: Turn findings from any input (spreadsheet, doc, pasted text) into an Azure DevOps backlog: extract, triage, classify by your project's process, create with a dry-run gate, and write ticket links back to the source.

plugins.name: dev-workflows
plugins.description: General-purpose development workflow skills. Ships grill-then-plan (domain-aware grilling that hands off to the superpowers planning pipeline), problem-description (interactive step-by-step HTML walkthroughs of complex technical problems), management-talk (reshape engineer-to-engineer updates for engineering-org leadership across JIRA, Slack, standup, email, or meeting channels), fit-gap-analysis (evidence-first comparison of a spec/vision/competitor against a system as actually built — capability matrix + user-journey comparison verified against the live system, clustered into decisions), naming-audit (verify a source list of labels/values/mappings against a system's authoritative source of record item-by-item — trace each label to its bound field, compare wording against the live system, source-of-truth wins; fixed per-item card with verdict + app/code path), and ticket-trace (two-way commit-ticket traceability — commits always carry their ticket number, and 'why was this changed?' is answered by walking git blame -> commit -> ticket -> tracker incl. attached images; optional commit-msg enforcement hook).

plugins.name: github-backlog
plugins.description: Turn findings from any input (spreadsheet, doc, pasted text) into GitHub Issues: extract, triage, classify by labels and milestone, visual dry-run, create with an approval gate, and write issue links back to the source.
